warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
Point totals disagree: the criteria add up to 220, but the sheet states 230. One of them is wrong — check which.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Video Content: Fully address the concept and/or topic

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The main idea or subject matter is disregarded.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The central theme or subject is not explored in sufficient depth.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The main idea or subject is completely covered.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Someone unfamiliar with the subject can easily understand what the video is about.

criteria.name: Video Content: Video contains multiple elements providing evidence of production skill

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The video shows no indication of expertise in its creation.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video's construction reveals only basic editing abilities.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video incorporates smooth changes between scenes and utilizes various technical tools.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video employs several sophisticated filmmaking methods.

criteria.name: Video Content: Grammar, spelling, and punctuation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The video has at least four mistakes in its grammar, spelling, or punctuation.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video has a maximum of three errors related to spelling, grammar, or punctuation.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video includes a single mistake in grammar, spelling, or punctuation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video is entirely free of any errors in grammar, spelling, or punctuation.

criteria.name: Video Content: Copyright information and sources are noted and documented, and video content is original

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Details about copyright or sources are either missing, incorrectly referenced, and the video's material is not unique.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The content infringes on copyright rules and sourcing expectations, or the video's material is not unique.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Copyright details and sources are properly recorded, and the video's material is unique.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Compliance with copyright is documented, sources are cited visually, and the video's content is original.

criteria.name: Project Evaluation: Video has logical flow of information

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The sequence of the video does not appear coherent.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The progression fails to connect each part of the video.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The progression is sensible and structured with a clear beginning, middle, and end.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video is coherent, transitions smoothly, and concludes with a prompt for action.

criteria.name: Project Evaluation: Quality of editing and transition

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No transitions or evidence of video editing are present.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Transitions exist but are abrupt and do not integrate smoothly.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Transitions are seamless and function as an integral part of the video.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Various types of transitions are employed, all integrating flawlessly.

criteria.name: Project Evaluation: Audio and visual elements are coordinated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Audio and visual components are minimal.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Audio and visual components lack diversity.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Audio utilizes diverse sources, including direct and dubbed sound; visuals incorporate multiple camera angles and techniques.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Audio and visuals draw from various sources and include special effects.

criteria.name: Project Evaluation: Use of video/film techniques

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No use of video technology is apparent.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video incorporates filmmaking methods.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video demonstrates sophisticated use of filmmaking methods.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video includes several advanced filmmaking techniques, such as special effects.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The video exceeds two minutes in length.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video is two minutes long or less.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the event topic

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No comprehension of the event's subject matter.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding of the subject is inconsistent between the video and the presentation.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The subject is effectively conveyed through the presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Expert knowledge of the subject is shown through the presentation.

criteria.name: Describes the use and implementation of innovative technology

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No explanation is provided for how the technology is used or put into practice.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either the innovative technology is identified OR its implementation is described.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The use and demonstration of video techniques, equipment, and software are explained and shown.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: An expert-level explanation and demonstration of video techniques, equipment, and software are provided.

criteria.name: Explains the design and development process

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No explanation or description of the design and development process is given.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) explain either the design OR the development process.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) explain both the design and the development process.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: An expert-level, industry-standard explanation of both the design and development process is provided.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The video is not shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A video of any duration is presented.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video is presented, but its introduction and transition back to the presentation are insufficient.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The video is presented with a suitable introduction and a smooth transition back to the presentation.

criteria.name: Copyright and source information is noted and documented, and video content is original

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Details about copyright or sources are either missing, incorrectly referenced, and the video's material is not unique.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The content infringes on copyright rules and sourcing expectations, or the video's material is not unique.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Copyright details and sources are properly recorded, and the video's material is unique.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Compliance with copyright is documented, sources are cited visually, and the video's content is original.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were ready, but the sequence was not coherent.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a sensible order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a sensible order, and all statements were clearly structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified skills were demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified skills were demonstrated, enhancing the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No responses are given to questions, or responses are completely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Answers are incomplete or unclear, indicating a limited grasp of the subject.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Most questions are answered accurately and clearly, showing sufficient understanding.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Answers are confident, clear, accurate, and insightful, improving the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: Compliance with rules for competitive events: The pre-recorded segment must not exceed 2 minutes; only permitted technology devices were used (size specifications followed; maximum of two, with only one facing judges at a time); the presentation aligned with the assigned topic; professional boundaries were maintained during setup time (no interaction with judges); no materials were left behind after the presentation; links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges); audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round); and the use of food or live animals was avoided.

levels.label: Competitor(s) Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) failed to adhere to the established rules.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines: (All criteria must be met)
levels.descriptor: All specified criteria for execution were met.
